Disease: Cardiovascular Diseases (CVD)

Common Symptoms: Chest pain Chest discomfort pain in the upper abdomen
pain in the back pain in the throat pain in jaw pain in arms pain in
legs

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Disease: stroke

Common Symptoms: weakness in arm weakness in leg trouble seeing from one
or both eye severe headache with no known cause trouble walking sudden
confusion difficulty in speaking difficulty in understanding

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

professional consultation.

Recommended Doctor Type:
General Physician or relevant specialist depending on symptoms.

Medical Disclaimer:
This information is general medical guidance and does not replace professional consultation.
------------------------------------------------------------

Disease: Hepatitis C

Common Symptoms:
- fatigue
- loss of appetite
- nausea
- yellowing of eyes
- yellowish skin

Severity Level:
Consult a healthcare professional for severity assessment.

Recommended Action:
Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis and treatment.

When To Seek Immediate Care:
Seek urgent medical attention if symptoms are severe, sudden, or worsening.

Recommended Doctor Type:
General Physician or relevant specialist depending on symptoms.

Medical Disclaimer:
This information is general medical guidance and does not replace professional consultation.

Disease: Food poisoning

redness_of_eyes sinus_pressure runny_nose congestion chest_pain
loss_of_smell muscle_pain

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

nausea loss_of_appetite pain_behind_the_eyes back_pain malaise
muscle_pain red_spots_over_body

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Common Symptoms: continuous_sneezing chills fatigue high_fever headache
swelled_lymph_nodes malaise phlegm throat_irritation redness_of_eyes
sinus_pressure runny_nose congestion chest_pain loss_of_smell
muscle_pain

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

headache swelled_lymph_nodes phlegm throat_irritation redness_of_eyes
sinus_pressure runny_nose congestion chest_pain loss_of_smell
muscle_pain

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

constipation abdominal_pain diarrhoea toxic_look_(typhos)

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

loss_of_appetite abdominal_pain diarrhoea mild_fever yellowing_of_eyes
muscle_pain

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

professional consultation.

Common Symptoms: skin_rash joint_pain skin_peeling silver_like_dusting
small_dents_in_nails inflammatory_nails

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

and treatment.

and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

swollen_blood_vessels prominent_veins_on_calf

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

swelled_lymph_nodes malaise phlegm chest_pain blood_in_sputum

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Common Symptoms: itching skin_rash fatigue lethargy high_fever headache
loss_of_appetite mild_fever swelled_lymph_nodes malaise
red_spots_over_body

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

malaise phlegm chest_pain fast_heart_rate rusty_sputum

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

dark_urine nausea loss_of_appetite abdominal_pain yellowing_of_eyes
acute_liver_failure coma stomach_bleeding

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Disease: Alcoholic hepatitis

Common Symptoms: vomiting yellowish_skin abdominal_pain

fluid_overload

yellow_crust_ooze

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.

Common Symptoms: fatigue cramps bruising obesity swollen_legs
swollen_blood_vessels prominent_veins_on_calf

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

swelled_lymph_nodes malaise phlegm chest_pain blood_in_sputum

General Advice: Consult a healthcare professional for proper diagnosis
and treatment.

Note: This is general medical information and does not replace
professional consultation.
